summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Demo Mode and Sound Effects features for SyncTech FlowOps hackathon project. All new features working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate.

All LLM agent reasoning endpoints (demand, routing, recovery, inventory)
New orchestrator reasoning endpoint with conflict resolution
New weather prediction endpoint with storm/IPL event handling
Demo Mode button visible in header with correct purple styling (rgba(168,85,247,0.1))
SFX toggle button functionality (SFX On/Off state changes correctly)
Demo Mode 16-second scripted sequence: storm weather + IPL Match event
Agent stuck event during demo (Rajan status changed to active)
Orchestrator conflicts triggered (DEMAND vs ROUTING, ROUTING vs RECOVERY)
Cascade event with modal overlay showing 3 affected orders
CASCADE ALERT banner display with proper styling

System status changes to 'Demo Active' during demo
Demo auto-ends after 16 seconds with weather normalization to sunny
All existing features still functional (stores, agents, logs, stats, footer)
Weather prediction panel with live demand forecasting
Orchestrator panel with conflict tracking
Dark store inventory with real-time stock levels
Delivery agents status monitoring
SyncTech FlowOps footer branding
